docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,207.99 FILED BY GORDON, SETH AS TO DEFENDANT BARAKAT, SUBHI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-20-2026 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION TO USE A JUDGE PRO TEM CONSENT GIVEN VIA ZOOM FILED BY GORDON, SETH

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-20-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-20-2026 BY JUDGE PRO TEM MARGARET WU. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF SETH GORDON IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT SUBHI BARAKAT IS NOT PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED (D506)
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF GORDON, SETH
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-20-2026 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-08-2025, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, SERVICE FEE: $125.00 AS TO DEFENDANT BARAKAT, SUBHI
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF GORDON, SETH
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM GRANTED*** PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GORDON, SETH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BARAKAT, SUBHI $12,102.78 PRINCIPAL, $200.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $12,302.78, DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF FOR AMOUNTS PLAINTIFF LOANED TO DEFENDANT ($7024.88 DEPOSIT AND $2077.90 STORAGE FEE, AS SHOWN BY RECEIPTS SUBMITTED) AND $3000.00 BOOKING FOR EVENT THAT WAS CANCELLED AND DEFENDANT AGREED TO REFUND. PLAINTIFF IS ALSO ENTITLED TO POST-JUDGMENT INTEREST OF 10% PER ANNUM AS STATED IN CIVIL PROCEDURE CODE 685.010. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
